title: selaginella valdepilosa
intro: Selaginella valdepilosa is a species of spore-producing, vascular plant, commonly known as a resurrection plant due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella valdepilosa include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried or made into a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
